creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 09 Apr 2014 20:57 +0300 Vladimir Chukharev wrote:
> On Wed, 09 Apr 2014 20:21:03 +0300, Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org> wrote:
> 
> > You can ignore them:
> 
> "Them" is inability to install, right? I'd rather not... Well, sorry, I'm kidding.
> I mean I do not know how to tell portmaster to ignore them.

Unset DEVELOPER, qa checks are deployed only if DEVELOPER is set.
I'm surprised that portmaster treats stage-qa checks as fatal.

> > ~> head -2 /usr/local/share/apps/kconf_update/useragent.pl
> > #!/usr/bin/perl
> > # the script is called with interpreter, so don't worry about the path
